shere bangla national stadium, mirpur, d.venueName: Shere Bangla National Stadium, Mirpur, Dhaka
shere bangla national stadium, mirpur, d.about: The Shere Bangla National Stadium in Mirpur is Bangladesh's largest cricket ground — a roaring bowl of green and red when the Tigers play at home.
shere bangla national stadium, mirpur, d.cityAbout: Dhaka is a vibrant megacity on the Buriganga, famous for street food, rickshaws, and passionate cricket crowds that turn every international into a festival.
shere bangla national stadium, mirpur, d.weather: Typical match months are warm and humid (28–35°C) with occasional thunderstorms in monsoon season; dry winter evenings are pleasant for night games.

bir sreshtho flight lieutenant matiur ra.venueName: Bir Sreshtho Flight Lieutenant Matiur Rahman Stadium, Chattogram
bir sreshtho flight lieutenant matiur ra.about: Zahur Ahmed Chowdhury Stadium sits near the Karnaphuli — a compact ground where the atmosphere builds quickly and boundaries fly in the evening light.
bir sreshtho flight lieutenant matiur ra.cityAbout: Chattogram is Bangladesh's port city, blending hills, beaches, and a laid-back coastal vibe — perfect for a tour stop between Dhaka and Sylhet.
bir sreshtho flight lieutenant matiur ra.weather: Coastal humidity is noticeable year-round; expect 27–33°C with sea breeze, and heavier rain during the June–September monsoon.

zahur ahmed chowdhury stadium, chattogra.about: Zahur Ahmed Chowdhury Stadium sits near the Karnaphuli — a compact ground where the atmosphere builds quickly and boundaries fly in the evening light.
zahur ahmed chowdhury stadium, chattogra.cityAbout: Chattogram is Bangladesh's port city, blending hills, beaches, and a laid-back coastal vibe — perfect for a tour stop between Dhaka and Sylhet.
zahur ahmed chowdhury stadium, chattogra.weather: Coastal humidity is noticeable year-round; expect 27–33°C with sea breeze, and heavier rain during the June–September monsoon.

sylhet international cricket stadium, sy.about: Sylhet International Cricket Stadium is one of the newer jewels in Bangladesh cricket — scenic, modern, and loved for T20 fireworks under lights.
sylhet international cricket stadium, sy.cityAbout: Sylhet is the tea-country capital of Bangladesh, surrounded by rolling hills and lush estates — a cooler, greener escape for players and fans.
sylhet international cricket stadium, sy.weather: Slightly cooler than the lowlands (24–32°C); monsoon brings lush rain while winter months are mild and comfortable for evening cricket.
